mapper.select: SELECT -- 关联记录字段 par.id AS relId, par.advisor_round AS advisorRound, par.rel_status AS relStatus, par.remark AS remark, par.create_time AS createTime, -- 论文关联字段（paper_submit 表） ps.id AS paperId, ps.paper_title AS paperTitle, ps.paper_type AS paperType, -- 指导老师关联字段（sys_user 表） su.id AS advisorId, su.real_name AS advisorName, -- 指导老师所属专业（major 表） m.major_name AS advisorMajor FROM paper_advisor_rel par -- 关联论文表（获取论文标题） LEFT JOIN paper_submit ps ON par.paper_id = ps.id AND ps.is_deleted = 0 -- 关联指导老师表（获取姓名） LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON par.advisor_id = su.id AND su.is_deleted = 0 -- 关联专业表（获取专业名称） LEFT JOIN major m ON par.advisor_major_id = m.id WHERE par.paper_id = #{paperId} AND par.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY par.advisor_round ASC; -- 按轮次升序，前端按顺序展示
